title: anacamptis × genevensis
intro: Anacamptis × genevensis, also known as the Geneva pyramidal orchid, is a hybrid plant species within the Orchidaceae family, resulting from the cross between Anacamptis pyramidalis and Neotinea ustulata. The medicinal properties of Anacamptis × genevensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are primarily attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of the plant are said to include reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and antioxidant protection. Anacamptis × genevensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
